translations.en: I'm going home, because it's raining.
translations.es: Me voy a casa porque está lloviendo.
translations.de: Ich gehe nach Hause, weil es regnet.
translations.ru: Я иду домой, потому что идет дождь.
translations.pt: Vou para casa porque está a chover.
translations.he: אני חוזר הביתה כי יורד גשם.
translations.vi: Tôi về nhà vì trời đang mưa.
translations.ar: سأعود إلى البيت لأن المطر يهطل.
translations.nl: Ik ga naar huis omdat het regent.
translations.uk: Я йду додому, бо йде дощ.
translations.hi: मैं घर जा रहा हूँ क्योंकि बारिश हो रही है।
translations.pl: Wracam do domu, bo pada deszcz.
translations.nb: Jeg går hjem fordi det regner.
translations.sv: Jag går hem eftersom det regnar.
translations.da: Jeg går hjem, fordi det regner.
translations.ja: 雨が降っているので家に帰ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic preceding the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive meaning 'to return/go home'.
Causal coordinating conjunction linking the main clause to a clause giving the reason.
Impersonal subject pronoun used with a weather verb.
Weather verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.

sentences.target: Reste ici, car il y a des voitures.
sentences.reading: /ʁɛst isi kaʁ il ja de vwatyr/

translations.fr: Reste ici, car il y a des voitures.
translations.ipa: /ʁɛst isi kaʁ il ja de vwatyr/
translations.en: Stay here, because there are cars.
translations.de: Bleib hier, weil hier Autos vorbeifahren.
translations.it: Resta qui perché ci sono delle auto.
translations.ru: Останься здесь, потому что тут ездят машины.
translations.vi: Ở lại đây vì có xe.
translations.nl: Blijf hier, want er zijn auto's.
translations.uk: Залишайся тут, бо тут їздять машини.
translations.hi: यहीं रुको क्योंकि यहाँ गाड़ियाँ चल रही हैं।
translations.pl: Zostań tutaj, bo jeżdżą tu samochody.
translations.nb: Bli her, for det kjører biler.
translations.id: Tetap di sini karena ada mobil.
translations.sv: Stanna här, för det är bilar här.
translations.ro: Stai aici pentru că sunt mașini.
translations.cs: Zůstaň tady, protože tu jezdí auta.
translations.da: Bliv her, for der kører biler.
translations.fi: Pysy tässä, koska täällä ajaa autoja.
translations.ja: 車が通っているからここにいてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; command addressed to the addressee.
Adverb of place indicating location.
Causal coordinating conjunction introducing the reason.
Dummy subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'il y a'.
Main verb 'avoir', present indicative, 3rd person singular; in 'il y a' forms the existential 'there is/are'.
Indefinite plural article introducing a plural noun.
Common noun, plural; head of the noun phrase 'des voitures'.

sentences.target: On part, car le magasin ferme.

translations.fr: On part, car le magasin ferme.
translations.en: We're leaving, because the store is closing.
translations.es: Nos vamos porque la tienda cierra.
translations.de: Wir gehen, weil der Laden schließt.
translations.it: Ce ne andiamo perché il negozio sta chiudendo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们走了，因为商店要关门了。
translations.yue: 我哋走啦，因為舖頭要收檔。
translations.ru: Мы уходим, потому что магазин закрывается.
translations.pt: Vamos embora porque a loja vai fechar.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi vì cửa hàng sắp đóng cửa.
translations.nl: We gaan weg omdat de winkel sluit.
translations.hi: हम जा रहे हैं क्योंकि दुकान बंद हो रही है।
translations.id: Kami pergi karena toko akan tutup.
translations.ro: Plecăm pentru că magazinul se închide.
translations.ja: 店が閉まるので、もう帰ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'on'.
Causal coordinating conjunction linking clauses.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'ferme'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; indicates the store's action.

sentences.target: Nous ne venons pas, car nous sommes malades.
sentences.reading: /nu nə vənɔ̃ pa kaʁ nu sɔm malad/

translations.fr: Nous ne venons pas, car nous sommes malades.
translations.ipa: /nu nə vənɔ̃ pa kaʁ nu sɔm malad/
translations.en: We aren't coming, because we are sick.
translations.de: Wir kommen nicht, weil wir krank sind.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不来，因为我们生病了。
translations.yue: 我哋唔嚟，因為我哋病咗。
translations.ru: Мы не придем, потому что мы больны.
translations.he: אנחנו לא באים כי אנחנו חולים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không đến vì chúng tôi bị bệnh.
translations.nl: We komen niet omdat we ziek zijn.
translations.uk: Ми не прийдемо, бо ми хворі.
translations.hi: हम नहीं आ रहे हैं क्योंकि हम बीमार हैं।
translations.nb: Vi kommer ikke fordi vi er syke.
translations.id: Kami tidak datang karena kami sakit.
translations.sv: Vi kommer inte eftersom vi är sjuka.
translations.ro: Nu venim pentru că suntem bolnavi.
translations.da: Vi kommer ikke, fordi vi er syge.
translations.ja: 病気なので、私たちは来ません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Negative particle; first part of discontinuous negation (ne...pas).
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Negative adverb completing the negation with 'ne'.
Causal coordinating conjunction introducing the reason clause.
Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the copular clause.
Copula, present indicative, 1st person plural; links subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, plural to agree with 'nous'.

jp: Reste ici, car il y a des voitures.
On part, car le magasin ferme.
Nous ne venons pas, car nous sommes malades.
fu: /ʁɛst isi kaʁ il ja de vwatyr/
/nu nə vənɔ̃ pa kaʁ nu sɔm malad/
fr: Reste ici, car il y a des voitures.
On part, car le magasin ferme.
Nous ne venons pas, car nous sommes malades.
ipa: /ʁɛst isi kaʁ il ja de vwatyr/
/nu nə vənɔ̃ pa kaʁ nu sɔm malad/
en: I'm going home, because it's raining.
Stay here, because there are cars.
We're leaving, because the store is closing.
We aren't coming, because we are sick.
